screenshot_files.note: Puppeteer timed out (resource limits). Review based on thorough source code analysis + prior screenshots.

summary: No code changes since review #47. All 20 suggestions carry over unchanged. The 1 HIGH bug (honorific dead code) and 8 MEDIUM items remain unfixed. Score stable. Nothing new to report — this is a verification pass confirming prior findings are still valid.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] Honorific 'night owl' appears during daytime when team is empty — dead code fallback
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1132: HONORIFICS[isAfterHours ? 'after-hours' : teamVibe.key] ?? 'boss'. When workers.length===0, vibe.js returns key='after-hours' regardless of time. The ?? 'boss' fallback never fires. Fix: check isAfterHours directly before using after-hours key.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] Paused pill says 'move mouse to refresh' on touch devices
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1152: hardcoded 'move mouse' text. Touch resume works now but text is wrong. Detect pointer:coarse and show 'Tap to refresh'. Add onClick to pill.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] Ghost characters in tab order — tabIndex=0 on non-interactive elements
suggestions.description: Office.jsx line 683: tabIndex={0} unconditional. Ghost variants have no handleClick. Fix: tabIndex={handleClick ? 0 : -1}

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #44→#48] Daytime sky over-darkened (flat grey, hours 9-16)
suggestions.description: Office.css sky brightness too low during daytime. 5th cycle unfixed.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #46→#48] Sunrise hours (5-8) show no decorative elements
suggestions.description: WindowElement sunrise period has label but no visual elements like sun gradient or clouds.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] TEAM VIBE card orphaned half-width on mobile
suggestions.description: Stats grid leaves TEAM VIBE as solo card on narrow viewports. Fix: full-width fallback.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] Activity filter logic duplicated across two JSX sites
suggestions.description: Extract shared filter function to reduce duplication.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] IIFE inside JSX for solo spotlight — extract to variable
suggestions.description: Inline IIFE is hard to read. Derive the value above the return.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] Ping reaction copy uses inconsistent person across workers
suggestions.description: Mixed first/second/third person in reaction text. Standardize.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #47→#48] Footer tagline counter desync after 9 clicks
suggestions.description: Missing modulo normalization on click counter.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #45→#48] Mobile Bloberto speech bubble overlaps Office tab pill
suggestions.description: On 375px viewports, speech bubble clips into tab area.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #44→#48] Coffee corner CSS label truncation on 320px
suggestions.description: Vibe label may clip on very narrow screens.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #46→#48] in-flow vibe missing coffee corner CSS modifier
suggestions.description: No .coffee-corner--in-flow class defined.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] cx/orbitR variable shadowing in ConferenceTable
suggestions.description: Inner map callbacks shadow outer scope variables.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] plantStageNames defined but never used
suggestions.description: Dead code. Remove.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] ProgressBar receives unused updatedAt prop
suggestions.description: Prop passed but never referenced in component.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] VibeSparkline has duplicate accessible text
suggestions.description: Both aria-label and title SVG element present. Remove one.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] conf-fire-glow hardcoded SVG filter ID
suggestions.description: Risk of DOM ID collision if multiple instances. Use useId().

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #42→#48] Sparkline legend uses array index as React key
suggestions.description: Use unique identifiers instead of array indices.

suggestions.title: [CARRY-OVER #46→#48] formatDuration and formatIdleDuration are near-identical
suggestions.description: Extract shared utility function.
